utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with required details: (1) health_coverage requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan lists physical_health €210/month, mental_health €120/month, total_health_cost €330/month. Fully specified. (2) property_coverage requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan provides provider, monthly_cost €95/month, and features. Cost present, so satisfied. (3) travel_coverage requires travel insurance with costs. The plan provides provider and monthly_cost €110/month with features; satisfied. (4) additional_services requires any enhancement services with costs. The plan lists services (assessments, support, documentation) but does not include any costs for these services; costs are missing. Not fully specified. (5) total_budget requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan provides monthly_cost €535/month and annual_cost €6,420/year with additional details; satisfied. Therefore, 4 of 5 items are fully specified.
